swindling. Important years will be 22nd, 25th, 33rd, 36th,
41st, 44th, 49th and 52nd.
Sagittarius or Dhanus
First Drekkana (1°-10°). Saturn will of course be the
lord of the house of wealth. Much depends on how the
subject is disposed. The nature is to rush into schemes

116 How to Judge a Horoscope
without proper consideration. Partnership does not suit him.
He will have two or more sources of income. He is liable to
reversals at about the age of 32. The subject will lose
money through association with fraudulent organisations.
Much care is necessary in the signing of important
contracts, papers, agreements and documents. Important
years will be 19th, 20th, 28th, 29th, 37th, 38th, 46th and
55th.
Second Drekkana (11°-20°).—The native is more or
less a rolling stone, unable to stick to any particular
avocation. There will be a general feeling of uncertainty.
The income will fluctuate. Even if in service, there will be
many vicissitudes. Speculation and gambles should be
